title: Senior Manager Mortgages Credit Risk Underwriting – Global Digital Banks Germany
required_skills: 7+ years experience in credit risk management for retail clients (mortgage focus)
Leading underwriting teams with decision-making authority
Deep knowledge of full mortgage lifecycle (origination, underwriting, activation)
In-depth knowledge of German mortgage market (distribution channels, collateral, borrower behaviour)
Command of European/German regulatory frameworks (CRR/CRD, EBA guidelines, MaRisk)
Experience with acceptance models and risk parameters (PD, LGD, affordability metrics)
bonus_skills: Data analysis and data-driven decision making
matched_skills: Analytical skills and structured thinking — partial alignment with risk parameter analysis bonus
Stakeholder management and cross-functional coordination — generic match only
missing_skills: No credit risk management experience whatsoever — this is the core requirement (7+ years)
No mortgage underwriting background or knowledge
No knowledge of German mortgage market, collateral practices, or borrower behaviour
No regulatory framework expertise (CRR/CRD, EBA, MaRisk)
No experience with PD/LGD models or risk acceptance frameworks
German is B1, not the required high-level fluency
core_responsibilities: End-to-end credit risk review for German mortgage portfolio
Define credit risk acceptance policies aligned with BBVA global standards and local regulations
Design mortgage underwriting processes including decision workflows, governance and controls
Collaborate with product management on mortgage offering design and risk-based pricing
Monitor, define and report key risk KPIs
Support definition of acceptance policies for consumer credit products
recommended_emphasis: This role is not suitable for this candidate — do not apply
The core requirement of 7+ years mortgage credit risk management is a fundamental gap with no workaround
German B1 vs required high-level German is an additional disqualifying gap
If applying speculatively, the only transferable angle is the USD 8M budget governance and KPI reporting framework at HSBC — but this is insufficient for a senior specialist role
summary: Poor match at 12.5%. This is a deeply specialised mortgage credit risk underwriting role requiring 7+ years of domain-specific expertise in PD/LGD models, German regulatory frameworks (MaRisk, CRR), and mortgage lifecycle management. The candidate has no credit risk, underwriting, or banking product background. German B1 falls well short of the required high level. Not recommended for application.
